工具定义中与样式应用相关的部分\\\",\\\"signature\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":30}\",\"8a95574e-cd97-4e74-a81e-ae35ce58cf95\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"3e150052-dd0c-4414-a998-c8dc52348020\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T12:16:46.250Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"以下是从设计方案中提取的详细内容：\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 一、样式应用（apply_styles）设计方案\\\\n\\\\n### 1.1 Tool 定义（第 308-316 行）\\\\n\\\\n工具名 &#96;apply_styles&#96;，支持三种模式：\\\\n- **&#96;save&#96;**：注入 CSS 到页面并永久保存，下次访问自动应用\\\\n- **&#96;rollback_last&#96;**：撤销最后一次样式修改\\\\n- **&#96;rollback_all&#96;**：回滚所有样式\\\\n\\\\n参数：\\\\n- &#96;css&#96;（save 模式必填）— 要注入的 CSS 文本\\\\n- &#96;mode&#96;（必填）— &#96;save&#96; / &#96;rollback_last&#96; / &#96;rollback_all&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 1.2 跨两个执行环境的实现（第 319-326 行）\\\\n\\\\n**Content Script 端（&#96;content.js&#96;）：**\\\\n- 维护 &#96;cssStack&#96; 数组作为变更栈\\\\n- &#96;injectCSS(css)&#96;：压入栈，通过 &#96;&lt;style id=\\\\\\\"styleswift-active\\\\\\\"&gt;&#96; 元素注入页面（首次创建追加到 &#96;&lt;head&gt;&#96;）\\\\n- &#96;rollbackCSS(scope)&#96;：按 scope 弹出栈顶或清空整个栈，更新 &#96;&lt;style&gt;&#96; 元素\\\\n\\\\n**Side Panel 端（&#96;tools.js&#96;）的 &#96;runApplyStyles&#96; 按 mode 分派：**\\\\n\\\\n| mode | 行为 |\\\\n|------|------|\\\\n| &#96;rollback_all&#96; | 向 Content Script 发回滚全部指令 → 清除 chrome.storage 中的会话样式和永久样式 → 更新样式摘要 |\\\\n| &#96;rollback_last&#96; | 向 Content Script 发回滚最后一步指令 → 通过 &#96;get_active_css&#96; 获取剩余 CSS → 重新同步存储 |\\\\n| &#96;save&#96; | 向 Content Script 发注入指令 → &#96;mergeCSS(已有CSS, 新CSS)&#96; 去重合并 → 写入会话样式 key 和永久样式 key → 更新样式摘要 |\\\\n\\\\n### 1.3 CSS 特异性策略（第 329-346 行）\\\\n\\\\n双重保障机制：\\\\n\\\\n**System Prompt 引导 LLM：**\\\\n- 使用具体选择器（如 &#96;.site-header&#96;、&#96;main#content&#96;），不用 &#96;*&#96; 或标签通配\\\\n- 所有声明加 &#96;!important&#96;\\\\n- 避免 &#96;@import&#96; 或修改 &#96;&lt;link&gt;&#96;\\\\n- 颜色使用 hex/rgba，不使用 CSS 变量\\\\n\\\\n**注入层级保障（从低到高）：**\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n页面原始样式              ← 特异性由页面决定\\\\n  ↓\\\\nstyleswift-persistent    ← 永久样式（early-inject.js 注入，document_start）\\\\n  ↓\\\\nstyleswift-active        ← 当前会话样式（content.js 注入，document_idle）\\\\n  ↓\\\\n!important               ← 所有 StyleSwift 规则都带 !important\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n注入位置：&#96;&lt;head&gt;&#96; 末尾，晚于页面 &#96;&lt;link&gt;&#96; 和 &#96;&lt;style&gt;&#96;，天然高优先级。\\\\n\\\\n### 1.4 CSP 兼容性（第 358-383 行）\\\\n\\\\n三级降级方案：\\\\n\\\\n| 优先级 | 方案 | 说明 |\\\\n|--------|------|------|\\\\n| 1 | &#96;&lt;style&gt;&#96; 标签注入 | 默认方案，代码最简单；被 CSP &#96;style-src&#96; 限制时失效 |\\\\n| 2 | Constructable Stylesheets (&#96;document.adoptedStyleSheets&#96;) | Chrome 73+，不受大部分 CSP 限制；需维护 &#96;CSSStyleSheet&#96; 实例引用 |\\\\n| 3 | &#96;chrome.scripting.insertCSS&#96; | 浏览器级别注入，完全绕过 CSP；需从 Side Panel/Service Worker 调用；需额外 &#96;scripting&#96; 权限 |\\\\n\\\\n&#96;detectCSSInjectionMethod()&#96; 首次收到工具调用时执行一次并缓存结果。&#96;injectCSSAuto&#96; 统一分派函数根据检测结果选择方案，方案 3 返回 &#96;{ fallback: 'scripting-api', css }&#96; 由 Side Panel 处理。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 二、样式保存/持久化设计方案\\\\n\\\\n### 2.1 存储 Key 设计（第 205-207 行）\\\\n\\\\n&#96;SessionContext&#96; 类基于域名和会话 ID 生成存储 key：\\\\n\\\\n| key | 格式 | 用途 |\\\\n|-----|------|------|\\\\n| &#96;stylesKey&#96; | &#96;sessions:{domain}:{sessionId}:styles&#96; | 会话级 CSS 样式 |\\\\n| &#96;metaKey&#96; | &#96;sessions:{domain}:{sessionId}:meta&#96; | 会话元数据 |\\\\n| &#96;historyKey&#96; | &#96;{domain}:{sessionId}&#96; | IndexedDB 对话历史 key |\\\\n| &#96;persistKey&#96; | &#96;persistent:{domain}&#96; | 域名级永久样式 |\\\\n| &#96;sessionIndex&#96; | &#96;sessions:{domain}:index&#96; | 域名下会话索引 |\\\\n\\\\n### 2.2 双层存储架构（第 575-604 行）\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\nchrome.storage.local（轻量高频）：\\\\n  \\\\\\\"persistent:{domain}\\\\\\\"              → string (CSS)     ← 永久样式\\\\n  \\\\\\\"sessions:{domain}:{id}:styles\\\\\\\"    → string (CSS)     ← 会话样式\\\\n  \\\\\\\"sessions:{domain}:{id}:meta\\\\\\\"      → object           ← 会话元数据\\\\n  \\\\\\\"sessions:{domain}:index\\\\\\\"          → array            ← 会话索引\\\\n\\\\nIndexedDB（大体积低频）：\\\\n  Database: \\\\\\\"StyleSwiftDB\\\\\\\"\\\\n  Object Store: \\\\\\\"conversations\\\\\\\"\\\\n  Key: \\\\\\\"{domain}:{sessionId}\\\\\\\"\\\\n  Value: [...messages array...]      ← 对话历史\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 2.3 永久样式自动注入（第 627-637 行）\\\\n\\\\n**文件：&#96;early-inject.js&#96;（&#96;document_start&#96; 阶段）：**\\\\n1. 获取当前域名\\\\n2. 从 &#96;chrome.storage.local&#96; 读取 &#96;persistent:{domain}&#96; CSS\\\\n3. 创建 &#96;&lt;style id=\\\\\\\"styleswift-persistent\\\\\\\"&gt;&#96; 注入\\\\n4. 因 &#96;document_start&#96; 时 &#96;&lt;head&gt;&#96; 可能不存在，优先追加到 &#96;document.head&#96;，否则追加到 &#96;document.documentElement&#96;\\\\n\\\\n两个 Content Script 分工：\\\\n\\\\n| 脚本 | 注入时机 | 职责 |\\\\n|------|---------|------|\\\\n| &#96;early-inject.js&#96; | &#96;document_start&#96; | 仅注入永久样式（防闪烁 FOUC） |\\\\n| &#96;content.js&#96; | &#96;document_idle&#96; | DOM 工具 + 消息监听 + CSS 注入/回滚 |\\\\n\\\\n### 2.4 样式摘要（第 735-737 行）\\\\n\\\\n&#96;updateStylesSummary&#96; 读取当前会话 CSS，统计规则数量和前 3 个选择器，生成一行摘要写入会话 meta 的 &#96;activeStylesSummary&#96; 字段，用于 Session Context 注入（让 LLM 知道当前已应用了什么样式）。\\\\n\\\\n### 2.5 存储清理（第 639-647 行）\\\\n\\\\n- 每域名最多保留 &#96;MAX_SESSIONS_PER_DOMAIN = 20&#96; 个会话\\\\n- 超过 &#96;SESSION_EXPIRE_DAYS = 90&#96; 天的会话自动清理\\\\n- 清理时同时删除 meta、styles、IndexedDB 对话历史\\\\n- &#96;persistent:{domain}&#96; 永久样式不随会话删除，仅当删除最后一个会话时通过 UI 询问用户是否一并清除\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 三、CSS 合并策略（第 349-356 行）\\\\n\\\\n**文件：&#96;css-merge.js&#96;**\\\\n\\\\n### 3.1 核心函数\\\\n\\\\n&#96;mergeCSS(existingCSS, newCSS)&#96; 流程：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\nexistingCSS + newCSS\\\\n      ↓\\\\n  parseRules 解析为 Map&lt;selector, Map&lt;property, value&gt;&gt;\\\\n      ↓\\\\n  按选择器合并：同选择器同属性以新值覆盖旧值\\\\n      ↓\\\\n  serializeRules 序列化回 CSS 文本\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 3.2 解析逻辑\\\\n\\\\n&#96;parseRules&#96; 的处理：\\\\n1. 先用 &#96;splitTopLevelBlocks&#96; 按顶层花括号正确分割（处理嵌套的 &#96;@media&#96;、&#96;@keyframes&#96; 等）\\\\n2. 普通规则按**选择器 + 属性**去重\\\\n3. at-rule（如 &#96;@media&#96;、&#96;@keyframes&#96;）整体作为一个单元按 header 去重\\\\n\\\\n### 3.3 数据结构\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\nMap&lt;selector, Map&lt;property, value&gt;&gt;\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n- 外层 Map 的 key 是 CSS 选择器（如 &#96;.site-header&#96;、&#96;body&#96;）\\\\n- 内层 Map 的 key 是 CSS 属性名，value 是属性值\\\\n- 同选择器同属性始终只保留最新值\\\\n\\\\n### 3.4 合并时机\\\\n\\\\n每次 &#96;apply_styles(save)&#96; 执行时调用 &#96;mergeCSS(已有CSS, 新CSS)&#96; 后写入存储。这确保：\\\\n- 多轮对话追加 CSS 不会膨胀\\\\n- 同一选择器的同一属性始终只保留最新值\\\\n- CSS 不会无限增长\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 四、工具定义中与样式应用相关的部分\\\\n\\\\n### 4.1 工具执行器（第 817-821 行）\\\\n\\\\n&#96;executeTool(name, args)&#96; 按工具名分派：\\\\n- **需要 Content Script 的工具**：&#96;get_page_structure&#96;、&#96;grep&#96;、&#96;apply_styles&#96; → 通过 &#96;sendToContentScript&#96; 发消息\\\\n- **Side Panel 本地工具**：&#96;get_user_profile&#96;、&#96;update_user_profile&#96;、&#96;load_skill&#96;、&#96;save_style_skill&#96;、&#96;list_style_skills&#96;、&#96;delete_style_skill&#96;、&#96;TodoWrite&#96;、&#96;Task&#96; → 直接调用对应函数\\\\n\\\\n### 4.2 Content Script 消息协议（第 827-829 行）\\\\n\\\\n消息格式 &#96;{ tool: '工具名', args?: {...} }&#96;，与样式相关的 tool 值：\\\\n\\\\n| tool 值 | 功能 |\\\\n|---------|------|\\\\n| &#96;inject_css&#96; | 调用 &#96;injectCSSAuto()&#96;（CSP 兼容分派） |\\\\n| &#96;rollback_css&#96; | 调用 &#96;rollbackCSS()&#96; |\\\\n| &#96;get_active_css&#96; | 返回当前 &#96;cssStack&#96; 内容 |\\\\n\\\\n### 4.3 子智能体（Task）中的样式生成（第 499-515 行）\\\\n\\\\n&#96;AGENT_TYPES&#96; 注册了 &#96;StyleGenerator&#96; 子智能体：\\\\n- 可用工具集：&#96;get_page_structure&#96;、&#96;grep&#96;、&#96;load_skill&#96;\\\\n- System Prompt：任务为根据用户意图生成 CSS 代码\\\\n- 输出 JSON 包含：&#96;css&#96;、&#96;affected_selectors&#96;、&#96;description&#96; 三个字段\\\\n- 子智能体最大迭代次数 &#96;SUB_MAX_ITERATIONS = 10&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 4.4 样式应用后的 UI 反馈（第 809-813 行）\\\\n\\\\nAgent 本轮完成后，若执行了 &#96;apply_styles(save)&#96;，在输入框上方浮现确认/撤销按钮：\\\\n- 单次应用：&#96;[✓ 确认效果] [↶ 撤销]&#96;\\\\n- 多次应用：&#96;[✓ 全部确认] [↶ 撤销最后一步 ▾]&#96;（展开可选\\\\\\\"全部撤销\\\\\\\"）\\\\n- 浮层消失条件：点击确认/撤销、用户发新消息（隐式确认）、60s 超时\\\\n\\\\n### 4.5 完整的样式应用交互流（第 892-917 行）\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n用户消息 → Agent Loop → LLM 返回 tool_use: get_page_structure\\\\n  → Content Script 遍历 DOM → 返回树形文本\\\\n  → LLM 返回 tool_use: load_skill('dark-mode-template')\\\\n  → 读取静态知识\\\\n  → LLM 返回 tool_use: apply_styles(css, mode='save')\\\\n  → Content Script 创建 &lt;style&gt; 注入 CSS\\\\n  → Side Panel mergeCSS 去重合并\\\\n  → 写入 chrome.storage.local（会话样式 + 永久样式）\\\\n  → LLM 返回文本确认\\\\n  → 持久化 history 到 IndexedDB\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n**总结核心数据流：**\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\nLLM 生成 CSS\\\\n    ↓\\\\nSide Panel: apply_styles(css, mode='save')\\\\n    ↓\\\\nContent Script: injectCSS → cssStack 压栈 → &lt;style&gt; 注入页面\\\\n    ↓\\\\nSide Panel: mergeCSS(已有CSS, 新CSS) → 去重合并\\\\n    ↓\\\\nchrome.storage.local:\\\\n  sessions:{domain}:{id}:styles  ← 会话级存储\\\\n  persistent:{domain}            ← 域名级永久存储\\\\n    ↓\\\\n下次访问: early-inject.js (document_start) → 读取 persistent:{domain} → &lt;style&gt; 注入（无闪烁）\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\"}\"},\"status\":\"completed\",\"context\":{\"composers\":[],\"selectedCommits\":[],\"selectedPullRequests\":[],\"selectedImages\":[],\"folderSelections\":[],\"fileSelections\":[],\"selections\":[],\"terminalSelections\":[],\"selectedDocs\":[],\"externalLinks\":[],\"cursorRules\":[],\"cursorCommands\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":[],\"subagentSelections\":[],\"browserSelections\":[],\"mentions\":{\"composers\":{},\"selectedCommits\":{},\"selectedPullRequests\":{},\"gitDiff\":[],\"gitDiffFromBranchToMain\":[],\"selectedImages\":{},\"folderSelections\":{},\"fileSelections\":{},\"terminalFiles\":{},\"selections\":{},\"terminalSelections\":{},\"selectedDocs\":{},\"externalLinks\":{},\"diffHistory\":[],\"cursorRules\":{},\"cursorCommands\":{},\"uiElementSelections\":[],\"consoleLogs\":[],\"ideEditorsState\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":{},\"subagentSelections\":{},\"browserSelections\":{}}},\"generatingBubbleIds\":[],\"isReadingLongFile\":false,\"codeBlockData\":{},\"originalFileStates\":{},\"newlyCreatedFiles\":[],\"newlyCreatedFolders\":[],\"createdAt\":1773121967075,\"hasChangedContext\":false,\"activeTabsShouldBeReactive\":true,\"capabilities\":[{\"type\":30,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":15,\"data\":{\"bubbleDataMap\":\"{}\"}},{\"type\":29,\"data\":{}}],\"name\":\"StyleSwift * StyleSwift - CSS Merge Engine\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * CSS 去重、合并、序列化逻辑\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * 主要功能：\\\\\\\\n * - splitTopLevelBlocks: 正确处理嵌套花括号的顶层块分割\\\\\\\\n * - parseRules: 解析 CSS 文本为结构化数据\\\\\\\\n * - mergeCSS: 合并两段 CSS（属性级去重）\\\\\\\\n * - serializeRules: 将结构化数据序列化为 CSS 文本\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * 错误处理策略（§11.3 CSS 解析容错）：\\\\\\\\n * - 畸形 CSS（未闭合花括号、非法字符）不导致崩溃\\\\\\\\n * - 解析失败时返回空 Map 或原始 CSS（降级处理）\\\\\\\\n * - 记录警告日志但不中断流程\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// ============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// 顶层块分割\\\\\\\\n// ============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 分割 CSS 为顶层块\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * 正确处理嵌套花括号（@media, @keyframes 等）的顶层块分割。\\\\\\\\n * 通过追踪大括号深度，确保嵌套规则被正确识别为一个整体。\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * 核心逻辑：\\\\\\\\n * 1. 遍历 CSS 字符串，追踪 &#96;{&#96; 和 &#96;}&#96; 的深度\\\\\\\\n * 2. 跳过 CSS 注释（/* ... * /）内的花括号，避免被误计入深度\\\\\\\\n * 3. 跳过字符串字面量（&#96;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&#96; / &#96;'...'&#96;）内的花括号，避免 &#96;content: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&#96; 等属性导致深度误计\\\\\\\\n * 4. 当遇到 &#96;{&#96; 时深度 +1\\\\\\\\n * 5. 当遇到 &#96;}&#96; 时深度 -1\\\\\\\\n * 6. 当深度回到 0 时，说明找到了一个完整的顶层块\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @param {string} css - CSS 文本\\\\\\\\n * @returns {string[]} 顶层块数组，每个元素是一个完整的 CSS 块\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @example\\\\\\\\n * // 普通规则\\\\\\\\n * splitTopLevelBlocks('.header { color: red; }')\\\\\\\\n * // → ['.header { color: red; }']\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @example\\\\\\\\n * // @media 嵌套规则\\\\\\\\n * splitTopLevelBlocks('@media (max-width: 600px) { .header { color: blue; } }')\\\\\\\\n * // → ['@media (max-width: 600px) { .header { color: blue; } }']\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @example\\\\\\\\n * // 混合规则\\\\\\\\n * splitTopLevelBlocks('.a { color: red; } @media print { .a { color: black; } } .b { margin: 0; }')\\\\\\\\n * // → ['.a { color: red; }', '@media print { .a { color: black; } }', '.b { margin: 0; }']\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nfunction splitTopLevelBlocks(css) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const blocks = [];\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // 空值处理\\\\\\\\n    if (!css || typeof css !== 'string') {\\\\\\\\n      return blocks;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    let depth = 0;\\\\\\\\n    let start = 0;\\\\\\\\n    let i = 0;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    while (i &lt; css.length) {\\\\\\\\n      const ch = css[i];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // 跳过 CSS 注释 /* ... */（注释内的花括号不计入深度）\\\\\\\\n      if (ch === '/' &amp;&amp; css[i + 1] === '*') {\\\\\\\\n        const end = css.indexOf('*/', i + 2);\\\\\\\\n        i = end === -1 ? css.length : end + 2;\\\\\\\\n        continue;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // 跳过字符串字面量 \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" 或 '...'（字符串内的花括号不计入深度）\\\\\\\\n      // 常见于 content: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" 等属性值\\\\\\\\n      if (ch === '\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"' || ch === \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"'\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") {\\\\\\\\n        const quote = ch;\\\\\\\\n        i++;\\\\\\\\n        while (i &lt; css.length) {\\\\\\\\n          if (css[i] === '\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\') { i += 2; continue; } // 跳过转义字符\\\\\\\\n          if (css[i] === quote) { i++; break; }\\\\\\\\n          i++;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n        continue;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      if (ch === '{') {\\\\\\\\n        depth++;\\\\\\\\n      } else if (ch === '}') {\\\\\\\\n        depth--;\\\\\\\\n        if (depth === 0) {\\\\\\\\n          // 找到一个完整的顶层块\\\\\\\\n          const block = css.slice(start, i + 1).trim();\\\\\\\\n          if (block) {\\\\\\\\n            blocks.push(block);\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n          start = i + 1;\\\\\\\\n        } else if (depth &lt; 0) {\\\\\\\\n          // 深度为负说明花括号不匹配（右括号多余），记录警告并重置深度\\\\\\\\n          console.warn('[StyleSwift] CSS 花括号不匹配（右括号多余），位置：', i, '| 深度：', depth);\\\\\\\\n          depth = 0;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      i++;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 如果遍历完还有未闭合的花括号，记录警告\\\\\\\\n    if (depth &gt; 0) {\\\\\\\\n      console.warn('[StyleSwift] CSS 存在未闭合的花括号，剩余深度：', depth, '| 部分内容可能被丢弃');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return blocks;\\\\\\\\n  } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n    // 分割失败，记录警告并返回空数组\\\\\\\\n    console.warn('[StyleSwift] splitTopLevelBlocks 失败，返回空数组：', error.message);\\\\\\\\n    return [];\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// ============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// CSS 规则解析\\\\\\\\n// ============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 解析 CSS 文本为结构化数据\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * 将 CSS 文本解析为 Map&lt;selector, Map&lt;prop, val&gt;&gt; 结构。\\\\\\\\n * - 普通规则：按选择器+属性解析，属性存储在 Map 中\\\\\\\\n * - at-rule（@media, @keyframes 等）：整体作为一个单元，使用 __raw__ 标记保留原始文本\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * 错误处理策略：\\\\\\\\n * - 解析失败时返回空 Map\\\\\\\\n * - 单个块解析失败时跳过该块继续处理其他块\\\\\\\\n * - 记录警告日志但不中断流程\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @param {string} css - CSS 文本\\\\\\\\n * @returns {Map&lt;string, Map&lt;string, string&gt;&gt;} 解析后的规则映射\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @example\\\\\\\\n * // 普通规则\\\\\\\\n * parseRules('.header { color: red; font-size: 14px; }')\\\\\\\\n * // → Map { '.header' =&gt; Map { 'color' =&gt; 'red', 'font-size' =&gt; '14px' } }\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @example\\\\\\\\n * // @media 规则\\\\\\\\n * parseRules('@media (max-width: 600px) { .header { color: blue; } }')\\\\\\\\n * // → Map { '@media (max-width: 600px)' =&gt; Map { '__raw__ =&gt; '@media (max-width: 600px) { .header { color: blue; } }' } }\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nfunction parseRules(css) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const rules = new Map();\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // 空值或非字符串处理\\\\\\\\n    if (!css || typeof css !== 'string' || !css.trim()) {\\\\\\\\n      return rules;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const blocks = splitTopLevelBlocks(css);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    for (const block of blocks) {\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        if (block.startsWith('@')) {\\\\\\\\n          // at-rule（@media, @keyframes 等）：整体作为一个单元，按 header 去重\\\\\\\\n          const headerEnd = block.indexOf('{');\\\\\\\\n          if (headerEnd === -1) {\\\\\\\\n            console.warn('[StyleSwift] CSS 解析警告：at-rule 缺少左花括号，跳过该块');\\\\\\\\n            continue;\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n          const header = block.slice(0, headerEnd).trim();\\\\\\\\n          if (header) {\\\\\\\\n            rules.set(header, new Map([['__raw__', block]]));\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n        } else {\\\\\\\\n          // 普通规则：按选择器+属性去重\\\\\\\\n          const braceIdx = block.indexOf('{');\\\\\\\\n          if (braceIdx === -1) {\\\\\\\\n            console.warn('[StyleSwift] CSS 解析警告：普通规则缺少左花括号，跳过该块');\\\\\\\\n            continue;\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n          const selector = block.slice(0, braceIdx).trim();\\\\\\\\n          if (!selector) {\\\\\\\\n            console.warn('[StyleSwift] CSS 解析警告：选择器为空，跳过该块');\\\\\\\\n            continue;\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\n          const lastBraceIdx = block.lastIndexOf('}');\\\\\\\\n          const body = braceIdx &lt; lastBraceIdx \\\\\\\\n            ? block.slice(braceIdx + 1, lastBraceIdx) \\\\\\\\n            : block.slice(braceIdx + 1);\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\n          const props = new Map();\\\\\\\\n          for (const decl of body.split(';')) {\\\\\\\\n            const colonIdx = decl.indexOf(':');\\\\\\\\n            if (colonIdx === -1) continue;\\\\\\\\n            const prop = decl.slice(0, colonIdx).trim();\\\\\\\\n            const val = decl.slice(colonIdx + 1).trim();\\\\\\\\n            if (prop &amp;&amp; val) {\\\\\\\\n              props.set(prop, val);\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\n          if (props.size &gt; 0) {\\\\\\\\n            rules.set(selector, props);\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      } catch (blockError) {\\\\\\\\n        // 单个块解析失败，记录警告但继续处理其他块\\\\\\\\n        const preview = block.length &gt; 50 ? block.slice(0, 50) + '...' : block;\\\\\\\\n        console.warn('[StyleSwift] CSS 块解析失败，跳过该块：', blockError.message, '| 内容：', preview);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return rules;\\\\\\\\n  } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n    // 整体解析失败，记录警告并返回空 Map\\\\\\\\n    console.warn('[StyleSwift] parseRules 解析失败，返回空 Map：', error.message);\\\\\\\\n    return new Map();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// ============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// CSS 规则序列化\\\\\\\\n// ============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 将结构化规则序列化为 CSS 文本\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * 将 Map&lt;selector, Map&lt;prop, val&gt;&gt; 序列化为格式化的 CSS 文本。\\\\\\\\n * - at-rule：直接输出原始文本\\\\\\\\n * - 普通规则：输出缩进格式\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @param {Map&lt;string, Map&lt;string, string&gt;&gt;} rules - 解析后的规则映射\\\\\\\\n * @returns {string} 格式化的 CSS 文本\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @example\\\\\\\\n * const rules = new Map([\\\\\\\\n *   ['.header', new Map([['color', 'red'], ['font-size', '14px']])]\\\\\\\\n * ]);\\\\\\\\n * serializeRules(rules);\\\\\\\\n * // → '.header {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  color: red;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  font-size: 14px;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n}'\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nfunction serializeRules(rules) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const lines = [];\\\\\\\\n    for (const [selector, props] of rules) {\\\\\\\\n      if (props.has('__raw__')) {\\\\\\\\n        // at-rule：直接输出原始文本\\\\\\\\n        lines.push(props.get('__raw__'));\\\\\\\\n      } else {\\\\\\\\n        // 普通规则：输出缩进格式\\\\\\\\n        const decls = Array.from(props).map(([p, v]) =&gt; &#96;  ${p}: ${v};&#96;).join('\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n');\\\\\\\\n        lines.push(&#96;${selector} {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n${decls}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return lines.join('\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n');\\\\\\\\n  } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n    // 序列化失败，记录警告并返回空字符串\\\\\\\\n    console.warn('[StyleSwift] serializeRules 失败，返回空字符串：', error.message);\\\\\\\\n    return '';\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// ============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// CSS 合并\\\\\\\\n// ============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 合并两段 CSS\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * 合并策略：\\\\\\\\n * - 同选择器同属性：新值覆盖旧值\\\\\\\\n * - 同选择器不同属性：追加到现有属性中\\\\\\\\n * - 不同选择器：直接合并\\\\\\\\n * - at-rule（@media, @keyframes 等）：整体替换\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * 错误处理策略：\\\\\\\\n * - 合并失败时返回已有的 CSS（降级处理）\\\\\\\\n * - 记录警告日志但不中断流程\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @param {string} existingCSS - 已有的 CSS 文本\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} newCSS - 新增的 CSS 文本\\\\\\\\n * @returns {string} 合并后的 CSS 文本\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @example\\\\\\\\n * // 同属性覆盖\\\\\\\\n * mergeCSS('.header { color: red; }', '.header { color: blue; }')\\\\\\\\n * // → '.header {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  color: blue;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n}'\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @example\\\\\\\\n * // 不同属性追加\\\\\\\\n * mergeCSS('.header { color: red; }', '.header { font-size: 14px; }')\\\\\\\\n * // → '.header {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  color: red;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  font-size: 14px;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n}'\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @example\\\\\\\\n * // 不同选择器合并\\\\\\\\n * mergeCSS('.header { color: red; }', '.footer { color: blue; }')\\\\\\\\n * // → '.header {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  color: red;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n.footer {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  color: blue;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n}'\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @example\\\\\\\\n * // @media 整体替换\\\\\\\\n * mergeCSS('@media print { .a { color: black; } }', '@media print { .a { color: gray; } }')\\\\\\\\n * // → '@media print { .a { color: gray; } }'\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nfunction mergeCSS(existingCSS, newCSS) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const existingRules = parseRules(existingCSS);\\\\\\\\n    const newRules = parseRules(newCSS);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    for (const [selector, props] of newRules) {\\\\\\\\n      if (props.has('__raw__')) {\\\\\\\\n        // at-rule 整体覆盖（@media, @keyframes 等）\\\\\\\\n        existingRules.set(selector, props);\\\\\\\\n      } else if (!existingRules.has(selector)) {\\\\\\\\n        // 新选择器：直接添加\\\\\\\\n        existingRules.set(selector, props);\\\\\\\\n      } else {\\\\\\\\n        // 已存在选择器：合并属性\\\\\\\\n        const existing = existingRules.get(selector);\\\\\\\\n        if (existing.has('__raw__')) {\\\\\\\\n          // 如果现有的是 at-rule，整体替换为普通规则\\\\\\\\n          existingRules.set(selector, props);\\\\\\\\n        } else {\\\\\\\\n          // 属性级合并：新值覆盖旧值\\\\\\\\n          for (const [prop, val] of props) {\\\\\\\\n            existing.set(prop, val);\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return serializeRules(existingRules);\\\\\\\\n  } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n    // 合并失败，降级处理：返回已有的 CSS\\\\\\\\n    console.warn('[StyleSwift] mergeCSS 合并失败，返回已有 CSS：', error.message);\\\\\\\\n    // 如果已有 CSS 也是无效的，返回空字符串\\\\\\\\n    return existingCSS || '';\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// ============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport { splitTopLevelBlocks, parseRules, serializeRules, mergeCSS };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":349}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\PRODUCT\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\PRODUCT\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\StyleSwift\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\extension\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\sidepanel\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\css-merge.js\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * StyleSwift - CSS Merge Engine\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * CSS 去重、合并、序列化逻辑\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * 主要功能：\\\\\\\\n * - splitTopLevelBlocks: 正确处理嵌套花括号的顶层块分割\\\\\\\\n * - parseRules: 解析 CSS 文本为结构化数据\\\\\\\\n * - mergeCSS: 合并两段 CSS（属性级去重）\\\\\\\\n * - serializeRules: 将结构化数据序列化为 CSS 文本\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * 错误处理策略（§11.3 CSS 解析容错）：\\\\\\\\n * - 畸形 CSS（未闭合花括号、非法字符）不导致崩溃\\\\\\\\n * - 解析失败时返回空 Map 或原始 CSS（降级处理）\\\\\\\\n * - 记录警告日志但不中断流程\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// ============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// 顶层块分割\\\\\\\\n// ============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 分割 CSS 为顶层块\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * 正确处理嵌套花括号（@media, @keyframes 等）的顶层块分割。\\\\\\\\n * 通过追踪大括号深度，确保嵌套规则被正确识别为一个整体。\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * 核心逻辑：\\\\\\\\n * 1. 遍历 CSS 字符串，追踪 &#96;{&#96; 和 &#96;}&#96; 的深度\\\\\\\\n * 2. 跳过 CSS 注释（/* ... * /）内的花括号，避免被误计入深度\\\\\\\\n * 3. 跳过字符串字面量（&#96;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&#96; / &#96;'...'&#96;）内的花括号，避免 &#96;content: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&#96; 等属性导致深度误计\\\\\\\\n * 4. 当遇到 &#96;{&#96; 时深度 +1\\\\\\\\n * 5. 当遇到 &#96;}&#96; 时深度 -1\\\\\\\\n * 6. 当深度回到 0 时，说明找到了一个完整的顶层块\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @param {string} css - CSS 文本\\\\\\\\n * @returns {string[]} 顶层块数组，每个元素是一个完整的 CSS 块\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @example\\\\\\\\n * // 普通规则\\\\\\\\n * splitTopLevelBlocks('.header { color: red; }')\\\\\\\\n * // → ['.header { color: red; }']\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @example\\\\\\\\n * // @media 嵌套规则\\\\\\\\n * splitTopLevelBlocks('@media (max-width: 600px) { .header { color: blue; } }')\\\\\\\\n * // → ['@media (max-width: 600px) { .header { color: blue; } }']\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @example\\\\\\\\n * // 混合规则\\\\\\\\n * splitTopLevelBlocks('.a { color: red; } @media print { .a { color: black; } } .b { margin: 0; }')\\\\\\\\n * // → ['.a { color: red; }', '@media print { .a { color: black; } }', '.b { margin: 0; }']\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nfunction splitTopLevelBlocks(css) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const blocks = [];\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // 空值处理\\\\\\\\n    if (!css || typeof css !== 'string') {\\\\\\\\n      return blocks;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    let depth = 0;\\\\\\\\n    let start = 0;\\\\\\\\n    let i = 0;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    while (i &lt; css.length) {\\\\\\\\n      const ch = css[i];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // 跳过 CSS 注释 /* ... */（注释内的花括号不计入深度）\\\\\\\\n      if (ch === '/' &amp;&amp; css[i + 1] === '*') {\\\\\\\\n        const end = css.indexOf('*/', i + 2);\\\\\\\\n        i = end === -1 ? css.length : end + 2;\\\\\\\\n        continue;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // 跳过字符串字面量 \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" 或 '...'（字符串内的花括号不计入深度）\\\\\\\\n      // 常见于 content: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" 等属性值\\\\\\\\n      if (ch === '\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"' || ch === \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"'\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") {\\\\\\\\n        const quote = ch;\\\\\\\\n        i++;\\\\\\\\n        while (i &lt; css.length) {\\\\\\\\n          if (css[i] === '\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\') { i += 2; continue; } // 跳过转义字符\\\\\\\\n          if (css[i] === quote) { i++; break; }\\\\\\\\n          i++;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n        continue;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      if (ch === '{') {\\\\\\\\n        depth++;\\\\\\\\n      } else if (ch === '}') {\\\\\\\\n        depth--;\\\\\\\\n        if (depth === 0) {\\\\\\\\n          // 找到一个完整的顶层块\\\\\\\\n          const block = css.slice(start, i + 1).trim();\\\\\\\\n          if (block) {\\\\\\\\n            blocks.push(block);\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n          start = i + 1;\\\\\\\\n        } else if (depth &lt; 0) {\\\\\\\\n          // 深度为负说明花括号不匹配（右括号多余），记录警告并重置深度\\\\\\\\n          console.warn('[StyleSwift] CSS 花括号不匹配（右括号多余），位置：', i, '| 深度：', depth);\\\\\\\\n          depth = 0;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      i++;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 如果遍历完还有未闭合的花括号，记录警告\\\\\\\\n    if (depth &gt; 0) {\\\\\\\\n      console.warn('[StyleSwift] CSS 存在未闭合的花括号，剩余深度：', depth, '| 部分内容可能被丢弃');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return blocks;\\\\\\\\n  } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n    // 分割失败，记录警告并返回空数组\\\\\\\\n    console.warn('[StyleSwift] splitTopLevelBlocks 失败，返回空数组：', error.message);\\\\\\\\n    return [];\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// ============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// CSS 规则解析\\\\\\\\n// ============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 解析 CSS 文本为结构化数据\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * 将 CSS 文本解析为 Map&lt;selector, Map&lt;prop, val&gt;&gt; 结构。\\\\\\\\n * - 普通规则：按选择器+属性解析，属性存储在 Map 中\\\\\\\\n * - at-rule（@media, @keyframes 等）：整体作为一个单元，使用 __raw__ 标记保留原始文本\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * 错误处理策略：\\\\\\\\n * - 解析失败时返回空 Map\\\\\\\\n * - 单个块解析失败时跳过该块继续处理其他块\\\\\\\\n * - 记录警告日志但不中断流程\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @param {string} css - CSS 文本\\\\\\\\n * @returns {Map&lt;string, Map&lt;string, string&gt;&gt;} 解析后的规则映射\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @example\\\\\\\\n * // 普通规则\\\\\\\\n * parseRules('.header { color: red; font-size: 14px; }')\\\\\\\\n * // → Map { '.header' =&gt; Map { 'color' =&gt; 'red', 'font-size' =&gt; '14px' } }\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @example\\\\\\\\n * // @media 规则\\\\\\\\n * parseRules('@media (max-width: 600px) { .header { color: blue; } }')\\\\\\\\n * // → Map { '@media (max-width: 600px)' =&gt; Map { '__raw__ const body = braceIdx &lt; lastBraceIdx \\\\\\\\n            ? block.slice(braceIdx + 1, lastBraceIdx) \\\\\\\\n            : block.slice(braceIdx + 1);\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\n          const props = new Map();\\\\\\\\n          for (const decl of body.split(';')) {\\\\\\\\n            const colonIdx = decl.indexOf(':');\\\\\\\\n            if (colonIdx === -1) continue;\\\\\\\\n val);\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\n          if (props.size &gt; 0) {\\\\\\\\n            rules.set(selector, props);\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      } catch (blockError) {\\\\\\\\n        // 单个块解析失败，记录警告但继续处理其他块\\\\\\\\n        const preview = block.length &gt; 50 ? block.slice(0, 50) + '...' : block;\\\\\\\\n        console.warn('[StyleSwift] CSS 块解析失败，跳过该块：', blockError.message, '| 内容：', preview);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return rules;\\\\\\\\n  } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n    // 整体解析失败，记录警告并返回空 Map\\\\\\\\n    console.warn('[StyleSwift] parseRules 解析失败，返回空 Map：', error.message);\\\\\\\\n    return new Map();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// ============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 合并两段 CSS\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * 合并策略：\\\\\\\\n * - 同选择器同属性：新值覆盖旧值\\\\\\\\n * - 同选择器不同属性：追加到现有属性中\\\\\\\\n * - 不同选择器：直接合并\\\\\\\\n * - at-rule（@media, @keyframes 等）：整体替换\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * 错误处理策略：\\\\\\\\n * - 合并失败时返回已有的 CSS（降级处理）\\\\\\\\n * - 记录警告日志但不中断流程\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @param {string} existingCSS - 已有的 CSS 文本\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} newCSS - 新增的 CSS 文本\\\\\\\\n * @returns {string} 合并后的 CSS 文本\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @example\\\\\\\\n * // 同属性覆盖\\\\\\\\n * mergeCSS('.header { color: red; }', '.header { color: blue; }')\\\\\\\\n * // → '.header {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  color: blue;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n}'\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @example\\\\\\\\n * // 不同属性追加\\\\\\\\n * mergeCSS('.header { color: red; }', '.header { font-size: 14px; }')\\\\\\\\n * // → '.header {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  color: red;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  font-size: 14px;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n}'\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @example\\\\\\\\n * // 不同选择器合并\\\\\\\\n * mergeCSS('.header { color: red; }', '.footer { color: blue; }')\\\\\\\\n * // → '.header {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  color: red;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n.footer {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  color: blue;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n}'\\\\\\\\n * \\\\\\\\n * @example\\\\\\\\n * // @media 整体替换\\\\\\\\n * mergeCSS('@media print { .a { color: black; } }', '@media print { .a { color: gray; } }')\\\\\\\\n * // → '@media print { .a { color: gray; } }'\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nfunction mergeCSS(existingCSS, newCSS) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const existingRules = parseRules(existingCSS);\\\\\\\\n    const newRules = parseRules(newCSS);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    for (const [selector, props] of newRules) {\\\\\\\\n      if (props.has('__raw__')) {\\\\\\\\n        // at-rule 整体覆盖（@media, @keyframes 等）\\\\\\\\n        existingRules.set(selector, props);\\\\\\\\n      } else if (!existingRules.has(selector)) {\\\\\\\\n        // 新选择器：直接添加\\\\\\\\n        existingRules.set(selector, props);\\\\\\\\n      } else {\\\\\\\\n        // 已存在选择器：合并属性\\\\\\\\n        const existing = existingRules.get(selector);\\\\\\\\n        if (existing.has('__raw__')) {\\\\\\\\n          // 如果现有的是 at-rule，整体替换为普通规则\\\\\\\\n          existingRules.set(selector, props);\\\\\\\\n        } else {\\\\\\\\n          // 属性级合并：新值覆盖旧值\\\\\\\\n          for (const [prop, val] of props) {\\\\\\\\n            existing.set(prop, val);\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return serializeRules(existingRules);\\\\\\\\n  } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n    // 合并失败，降级处理：返回已有的 CSS\\\\\\\\n    console.warn('[StyleSwift] mergeCSS 合并失败，返回已有 CSS：', error.message);\\\\\\\\n    // 如果已有 CSS 也是无效的，返回空字符串\\\\\\\\n    return existingCSS || '';\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// ============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport { splitTopLevelBlocks, parseRules, serializeRules, mergeCSS Panel StyleSwift 样式应用与保存 — 完整代码逻辑分析\\\\n\\\\n### 一、整体架构概览\\\\n\\\\n样式系统涉及 **3 个执行环境**，通过 Chrome 消息机制协作：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n用户输入 → panel.js (UI) → agent-loop.js (Agent) → tools.js (工具执行)\\\\n                                                        ↓\\\\n                                                 Content Script (content.js)\\\\n                                                  - CSS 注入/回滚\\\\n                                                  - DOM 操作\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**持久化层级**（两层存储）：\\\\n- **会话级** &#96;sessions:{domain}:{sessionId}:styles&#96; — 仅当前会话使用\\\\n- **域名级** &#96;persistent:{domain}&#96; — 所有会话共享，跨会话聚合\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 二、&#96;tools.js&#96; — 工具定义与 &#96;apply_styles&#96; 核心逻辑\\\\n\\\\n#### 2.1 工具定义（&#96;APPLY_STYLES_TOOL&#96;）\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;60:85:extension/sidepanel/tools.js\\\\nconst APPLY_STYLES_TOOL = {\\\\n  name: 'apply_styles',\\\\n  description: &#96;应用或回滚CSS样式。\\\\n\\\\nmode 说明：\\\\n- save: 注入CSS到页面并永久保存（下次访问该域名自动应用）\\\\n- rollback_last: 撤销最后一次样式修改（保留之前的修改）\\\\n- rollback_all: 回滚所有已应用的样式\\\\n// ...\\\\n  input_schema: {\\\\n    properties: {\\\\n      css: { type: 'string', description: 'CSS代码（save 模式必填）' },\\\\n      mode: { type: 'string', enum: ['save', 'rollback_last', 'rollback_all'] }\\\\n    },\\\\n    required: ['mode']\\\\n  }\\\\n};\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n#### 2.2 &#96;runApplyStyles&#96; — 三种模式的执行逻辑\\\\n\\\\n这是样式应用的核心函数，跨 Side Panel 和 Content Script 两个环境工作：\\\\n\\\\n**save 模式**（第 519-542 行）：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;519:542:extension/sidepanel/tools.js\\\\n    if (mode === 'save') {\\\\n      // 1. 注入 CSS 到页面（发消息给 Content Script）\\\\n      const injectResp = await sendToContentScript({ tool: 'inject_css', args: { css } });\\\\n      \\\\n      // 2. 合并并写入会话样式（使用 mergeCSS 去重合并）\\\\n      const sKey = currentSession.stylesKey;\\\\n      const { [sKey]: existing = '' } = await chrome.storage.local.get(sKey);\\\\n      const merged = mergeCSS(existing, css);\\\\n      await chrome.storage.local.set({ [sKey]: merged });\\\\n      \\\\n      // 3. 重建永久样式（从所有会话聚合）\\\\n      await rebuildPersistentStyles();\\\\n      \\\\n      // 4. 更新样式摘要\\\\n      await updateStylesSummary();\\\\n      \\\\n      return &#96;已保存，下次访问 ${currentSession.domain} 自动应用&#96;;\\\\n    }\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**rollback_last 模式**（第 494-516 行）：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;494:516:extension/sidepanel/tools.js\\\\n    if (mode === 'rollback_last') {\\\\n      // 1. 通知 Content Script 回滚最后一条 CSS\\\\n      await sendToContentScript({ tool: 'rollback_css', args: { scope: 'last' } });\\\\n      \\\\n      // 2. 从 Content Script 获取当前剩余的 CSS\\\\n      const remainingCSS = await sendToContentScript({ tool: 'get_active_css' });\\\\n      \\\\n      // 3. 同步更新会话存储\\\\n      // 4. 重建永久样式\\\\n      // 5. 更新样式摘要\\\\n    }\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**rollback_all 模式**（第 477-491 行）：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;477:491:extension/sidepanel/tools.js\\\\n    if (mode === 'rollback_all') {\\\\n      // 1. 通知 Content Script 回滚所有 CSS\\\\n      await sendToContentScript({ tool: 'rollback_css', args: { scope: 'all' } });\\\\n      \\\\n      // 2. 删除当前会话样式\\\\n      await chrome.storage.local.remove(currentSession.stylesKey);\\\\n      \\\\n      // 3. 重建永久样式（从剩余会话聚合）\\\\n      await rebuildPersistentStyles();\\\\n      \\\\n      // 4. 更新样式摘要\\\\n      await updateStylesSummary();\\\\n    }\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n#### 2.3 &#96;rebuildPersistentStyles&#96; — 永久样式重建\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;445:467:extension/sidepanel/tools.js\\\\nasync function rebuildPersistentStyles() {\\\\n  const domain = currentSession.domain;\\\\n  const pKey = currentSession.persistKey;\\\\n  const indexKey = &#96;sessions:${domain}:index&#96;;\\\\n  const { [indexKey]: sessionIndex = [] } = await chrome.storage.local.get(indexKey);\\\\n  \\\\n  let rebuiltCSS = '';\\\\n  for (const item of sessionIndex) {\\\\n    const sid = typeof item === 'string' ? item : item.id;\\\\n    const otherKey = &#96;sessions:${domain}:${sid}:styles&#96;;\\\\n    const { [otherKey]: otherCSS = '' } = await chrome.storage.local.get(otherKey);\\\\n    if (otherCSS.trim()) {\\\\n      rebuiltCSS = rebuiltCSS ? mergeCSS(rebuiltCSS, otherCSS) : otherCSS;\\\\n    }\\\\n  }\\\\n  \\\\n  // 写入 persistent:{domain}\\\\n  if (rebuiltCSS.trim()) {\\\\n    await chrome.storage.local.set({ [pKey]: rebuiltCSS });\\\\n  } else {\\\\n    await chrome.storage.local.remove(pKey);\\\\n  }\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**关键设计**：每次 save/rollback 后都重建永久样式，遍历同域名下所有会话的 CSS，用 &#96;mergeCSS&#96; 逐一合并，写入 &#96;persistent:{domain}&#96;。这避免了多会话竞争写入的问题。\\\\n\\\\n#### 2.4 工具分派\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;764:776:extension/sidepanel/tools.js\\\\nconst TOOL_HANDLERS = {\\\\n  apply_styles: async (args) =&gt;\\\\n    await runApplyStyles(args.css || '', args.mode),\\\\n  // ...\\\\n};\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 三、&#96;css-merge.js&#96; — CSS 合并引擎\\\\n\\\\n#### 3.1 核心流程\\\\n\\\\n整个合并引擎包含 4 个函数的流水线：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\nCSS 文本 → splitTopLevelBlocks → parseRules → 合并 Map → serializeRules → CSS 文本\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n#### 3.2 &#96;splitTopLevelBlocks&#96; — 顶层块分割\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;54:122:extension/sidepanel/css-merge.js\\\\nfunction splitTopLevelBlocks(css) {\\\\n  // 追踪大括号深度，正确处理嵌套 @media/@keyframes\\\\n  // 跳过 CSS 注释 /* ... */ 和字符串字面量 \\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\" / '...'\\\\n  // 深度回到 0 时截取一个完整的顶层块\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n- 正确处理嵌套花括号（&#96;@media&#96;, &#96;@keyframes&#96;）\\\\n- 跳过注释和字符串中的花括号\\\\n- 花括号不匹配时记录警告但不崩溃\\\\n\\\\n#### 3.3 &#96;parseRules&#96; — CSS 解析为结构化数据\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;153:223:extension/sidepanel/css-merge.js\\\\nfunction parseRules(css) {\\\\n  // 返回 Map&lt;selector, Map&lt;prop, val&gt;&gt;\\\\n  // at-rule(@media等)：整体存储为 Map { '__raw__' =&gt; 原始文本 }\\\\n  // 普通规则：按 selector -&gt; Map&lt;prop, val&gt; 解析\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n#### 3.4 &#96;mergeCSS&#96; — 合并两段 CSS（核心）\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;308:342:extension/sidepanel/css-merge.js\\\\nfunction mergeCSS(existingCSS, newCSS) {\\\\n  const existingRules = parseRules(existingCSS);\\\\n  const newRules = parseRules(newCSS);\\\\n\\\\n  for (const [selector, props] of newRules) {\\\\n    if (props.has('__raw__')) {\\\\n      // at-rule 整体覆盖\\\\n      existingRules.set(selector, props);\\\\n    } else if (!existingRules.has(selector)) {\\\\n      // 新选择器：直接添加\\\\n      existingRules.set(selector, props);\\\\n    } else {\\\\n      // 已存在选择器：属性级合并（新值覆盖旧值）\\\\n      const existing = existingRules.get(selector);\\\\n      for (const [prop, val] of props) {\\\\n        existing.set(prop, val);\\\\n      }\\\\n    }\\\\n  }\\\\n\\\\n  return serializeRules(existingRules);\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**合并策略总结**：\\\\n| 场景 | 行为 |\\\\n|------|------|\\\\n| 同选择器同属性 | 新值覆盖旧值 |\\\\n| 同选择器不同属性 | 追加 |\\\\n| 不同选择器 | 直接合并 |\\\\n| at-rule（@media等） | 同 header 整体替换 |\\\\n| 解析失败 | 降级返回已有 CSS |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 四、&#96;content.js&#96; — CSS 注入与回滚（Content Script 端）\\\\n\\\\n#### 4.1 注入机制（三方案降级）\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;865:953:extension/content/content.js\\\\nfunction detectCSSInjectionMethod() {\\\\n  // 方案 1：&lt;style&gt; 标签注入（默认，兼容性最广）\\\\n  // 方案 2：Constructable Stylesheets（Chrome 73+，绕过部分 CSP）\\\\n  // 方案 3：通知 Side Panel 使用 chrome.scripting.insertCSS\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**CSS 变更栈**（内存中维护）：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;858:858:extension/content/content.js\\\\nconst cssStack = [];\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**注入 CSS**：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;944:953:extension/content/content.js\\\\nfunction injectCSS(css) {\\\\n  cssStack.push(css);               // 每次新增 CSS 推入栈\\\\n  const method = detectCSSInjectionMethod();\\\\n  if (method === 'scripting-api') {\\\\n    return { fallback: 'scripting-api', css: cssStack.join('\\\\\\\\n') };\\\\n  }\\\\n  applyCurrentCSS();                 // 将整个栈合并后注入\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**回滚 CSS**：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;961:968:extension/content/content.js\\\\nfunction rollbackCSS(scope = 'last') {\\\\n  if (scope === 'all') {\\\\n    cssStack.length = 0;             // 清空栈\\\\n  } else {\\\\n    cssStack.pop();                  // 弹出栈顶\\\\n  }\\\\n  applyCurrentCSS();                 // 重新注入剩余的 CSS\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**获取当前活动 CSS**：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;978:980:extension/content/content.js\\\\nfunction getActiveCSS() {\\\\n  return cssStack.join('\\\\\\\\n');\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n#### 4.2 会话切换支持\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;995:1050:extension/content/content.js\\\\nfunction unloadSessionCSS() {\\\\n  // 清空 cssStack，移除 &lt;style&gt; 元素，清除 adoptedSheet\\\\n}\\\\n\\\\nfunction loadSessionCSS(css) {\\\\n  // 清空 cssStack，推入新的 CSS，重新注入\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n#### 4.3 消息监听器\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;1205:1287:extension/content/content.js\\\\nchrome.runtime.onMessage.addListener((message, sender, sendResponse) =&gt; {\\\\n  switch (tool) {\\\\n    case 'inject_css':     injectCSS(args.css);        break;\\\\n    case 'rollback_css':   rollbackCSS(args.scope);    break;\\\\n    case 'get_active_css': sendResponse(getActiveCSS()); break;\\\\n    case 'unload_session_css': unloadSessionCSS();      break;\\\\n    case 'load_session_css':   loadSessionCSS(args.css); break;\\\\n    // ...\\\\n  }\\\\n});\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 五、&#96;agent-loop.js&#96; — Agent 循环中的样式处理\\\\n\\\\nAgent Loop 本身不直接处理样式逻辑，而是通过**工具调用机制**间接触发：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;1145:1175:extension/sidepanel/agent-loop.js\\\\n      if (block.type === 'tool_use') {\\\\n        // 死循环检测\\\\n        if (detectDeadLoop(block.name, block.input)) { ... }\\\\n        \\\\n        // 执行工具（包括 apply_styles）\\\\n        const output = await executeToolWithRetry(block.name, block.input, executeTool, toolContext);\\\\n        results.push({ type: 'tool_result', tool_use_id: block.id, content: output });\\\\n      }\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n关键点：\\\\n- 系统提示词中要求 LLM 生成 CSS 时使用 &#96;!important&#96;，使用具体选择器\\\\n- 工具执行带重试（最多 3 次）\\\\n- 有死循环检测（连续 3 次相同工具+参数自动中断）\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 六、&#96;panel.js&#96; — UI 层的样式状态管理\\\\n\\\\n#### 6.1 样式应用后的确认浮层\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;1444:1463:extension/sidepanel/panel.js\\\\n    if (applyStylesCount &gt; 0) {\\\\n      showConfirmationOverlay({\\\\n        applyCount: applyStylesCount,\\\\n        onConfirm: () =&gt; { console.log('[Panel] 样式已确认'); },\\\\n        onUndo: async () =&gt; {\\\\n          DOM.messageInput.value = '撤销最后一次样式修改';\\\\n          handleSendClick();       // 通过自然语言触发 rollback_last\\\\n        },\\\\n        onUndoAll: async () =&gt; {\\\\n          DOM.messageInput.value = '撤销所有样式修改';\\\\n          handleSendClick();       // 通过自然语言触发 rollback_all\\\\n        }\\\\n      });\\\\n    }\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n注意：撤销操作不是直接调用 &#96;runApplyStyles&#96;，而是将撤销请求作为用户消息发送给 Agent，由 Agent 决定调用 &#96;apply_styles(mode='rollback_last/rollback_all')&#96; 工具。\\\\n\\\\n#### 6.2 会话切换时的样式管理\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;2308:2378:extension/sidepanel/panel.js\\\\nasync function handleSessionClick(domain, sessionId) {\\\\n  // 1. 卸载当前会话样式\\\\n  await sendToContentScript({ tool: 'unload_session_css' });\\\\n  \\\\n  // 2. 创建新 SessionContext\\\\n  const newSession = new SessionContext(domain, sessionId);\\\\n  session.setCurrentSession(newSession);\\\\n  \\\\n  // 3. 加载目标会话样式并注入\\\\n  const stylesKey = newSession.stylesKey;\\\\n  const { [stylesKey]: sessionCSS = '' } = await chrome.storage.local.get(stylesKey);\\\\n  if (sessionCSS &amp;&amp; sessionCSS.trim()) {\\\\n    await sendToContentScript({ tool: 'load_session_css', args: { css: sessionCSS } });\\\\n    setHasActiveStyles(true);\\\\n  } else {\\\\n    setHasActiveStyles(false);\\\\n  }\\\\n  // ...\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n#### 6.3 删除会话时清理永久样式\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;2604:2637:extension/sidepanel/panel.js\\\\nasync function executeDeleteSession(domain, sessionId, clearPersistent) {\\\\n  const result = await session.deleteSession(domain, sessionId);\\\\n  \\\\n  if (clearPersistent &amp;&amp; result.lastSession) {\\\\n    const persistKey = &#96;persistent:${domain}&#96;;\\\\n    await chrome.storage.local.remove(persistKey);\\\\n  }\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 七、完整数据流总结\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n┌─ save 模式完整流程 ──────────────────────────────────────────────┐\\\\n│                                                                   │\\\\n│  LLM 生成 CSS                                                    │\\\\n│     ↓                                                             │\\\\n│  tools.js: runApplyStyles(css, 'save')                           │\\\\n│     ├── 1. sendToContentScript({tool:'inject_css', args:{css}})  │\\\\n│     │      → content.js: cssStack.push(css) + applyCurrentCSS()  │\\\\n│     │        → &lt;style#styleswift-active&gt; 或 adoptedStyleSheets   │\\\\n│     │                                                             │\\\\n│     ├── 2. mergeCSS(existingCSS, newCSS)                         │\\\\n│     │      → css-merge.js: 属性级去重合并                         │\\\\n│     │      → chrome.storage.local.set({sessions:d:s:styles})     │\\\\n│     │                                                             │\\\\n│     ├── 3. rebuildPersistentStyles()                              │\\\\n│     │      → 遍历所有会话 → mergeCSS 逐一合并                     │\\\\n│     │      → chrome.storage.local.set({persistent:domain})        │\\\\n│     │                                                             │\\\\n│     └── 4. updateStylesSummary() → 更新会话元数据摘要             │\\\\n│                                                                   │\\\\n│  panel.js: 检测到 apply_styles 调用 → 显示确认浮层                │\\\\n└───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**存储键结构**：\\\\n- &#96;sessions:{domain}:{sessionId}:styles&#96; — 单个会话的 CSS（会话级）\\\\n- &#96;persistent:{domain}&#96; — 域名级聚合 CSS（所有会话合并）\\\\n- &#96;sessions:{domain}:index&#96; — 同域名会话索引\\\\n\\\\n**Content Script 内存状态**：\\\\n- &#96;cssStack: string[]&#96; — CSS 变更栈，支持逐条回滚\\\\n- &#96;activeStyleEl&#96; / &#96;adoptedSheet&#96; — DOM Now I have comprehensive information about both the design document and the actual implementation. Let me analyze and compare them to identify any conflicts or discrepancies.

Let me organize my findings:

## Design vs Implementation Comparison

### 1. apply_styles Tool Definition
- **Design**: mode has 3 values: save, rollback_last, rollback_all
- **Implementation**: Same ✓

### 2. Content Script CSS Injection
- **Design**: cssStack array, injectCSS pushes to stack, rollbackCSS pops/clears stack, style element with id="styleswift-active"
- **Implementation**: Same ✓


### 3. CSP Compatibility (3-tier fallback)
- **Design**: <style> tag, Constructable Stylesheets, and chrome.scripting.insertCSS as fallbacks
- **Implementation**: detectCSSInjectionMethod() handles this ✓

### 4. CSS Merge
- **Design**: mergeCSS function with parseRules and serializeRules using nested Maps for selectors and properties
- **Implementation**: Same ✓

### 5. Storage Keys
- **Design**: sessions:{domain}:{sessionId}:styles, persistent:{domain}, etc.
- **Implementation**: Same ✓

### 6. Persistent Style Auto-injection
- **Design**: early-inject.js runs at document_start
- **Implementation**: Need to check if early-inject.js is actually present

### 7. UI Confirmation Overlay
- **Design**: Shows confirmation and undo buttons after applying styles
- **Implementation**: The panel displays the overlay, but undo routes through the Agent as a natural language message rather than directly invoking the rollback tool—this diverges from the design intent where buttons should trigger immediate rollback

, and introduces uncertainty since the undo depends on LLM interpretation

### 8. rebuildPersistentStyles
- **Design**: Rebuilds persistent styles from all sessions after each save or rollback
- **Implementation**: Matches the design ✓

### 9. Persistent style cleanup
- **Design**: Persistent styles remain unless the last session is deleted, then prompt the user
- **Implementation**: executeDeleteSession handles this with the clearPersistent parameter ✓

### 10. Style summary
- **Design**: updateStylesSummary creates a summary showing rule count and top 3 selectors
- **Implementation**: Matches the design ✓

I'm noticing a potential issue with the undo flow—routing it through the Agent means it won't be immediate or deterministic, which could be problematic for user experience.

There's also the cssStack in content.js being in-memory only, so it gets lost on page navigation, though persistent styles are handled separately by early-inject.js. And if there are many sessions, iterating through all of them to rebuild persistent styles could become slow.

Let me dig into the actual implementation files to catch any subtle discrepancies I might have missed.</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now let me also check a few more things:

1. The design mentions `injectCSSAuto` as the unified dispatch function, but the content.js uses `injectCSS` and `applyCurrentCSS` separately. Let me check.

2. The design mentions the confirmation overlay should disappear on: click confirm/undo, user sends new message (implicit confirm), 60s timeout. Let me check the implementation of `showConfirmationOverlay`.

3. The rollback_last in tools.js stores `remainingCSS` from content script's `getActiveCSS()`, which returns `cssStack.join('\n')`. 

I'm noticing a potential inconsistency here: the save mode uses `mergeCSS` to combine CSS before storing it, but rollback_last just stores the raw concatenated cssStack without merging. This means after a rollback, the session CSS would be the unmerged version rather than the properly merged one, creating a data mismatch between how CSS is stored in different scenarios. After rollback, the cssStack shrinks to just [CSS_A] and storage gets reset to CSS_A, which correctly undoes the CSS_B addition. The real question is whether the content script's cssStack—which holds individual CSS chunks and gets joined together for rendering—stays in sync with what's actually stored, especially when there's overlap between chunks. The rendered output stays consistent since concatenated CSS follows the same cascade rules as merged CSS, but the storage format becomes inconsistent—after rollback it's unnormalized concatenated CSS rather than the clean merged version that save produces. When rebuildPersistentStyles runs next, it'll normalize everything again anyway, so it's not a visual bug but more of a structural inconsistency in how the storage is maintained.

I'm also noticing a bigger issue: the confirmation overlay's undo button is supposed to directly trigger rollback, but instead it sends a natural language message to the Agent, which means it goes through a full LLM call with API costs and latency, and there's no guarantee the LLM will actually call the right function. This is a significant gap between the design intent and what's actually implemented.

Looking at the design spec more carefully, it specifies the button labels and dismissal conditions, but doesn't explicitly clarify whether undo should be a direct function call or routed through the Agent. The implementation chose the Agent route, which seems less reliable than a direct approach.

I'm also noticing a few other potential issues: the `rollback_last` function doesn't handle cases where the content script fails to respond, the `apply_styles` tool is actually a hybrid that operates across both the content script and side panel rather than being purely content-script-based, and there might be other edge cases worth examining.

Looking at the design document more closely, it claims that `apply_styles` is one of the tools that needs to go through the content script, but the actual implementation shows it's doing significant work in the side panel too—so there's a mismatch between what the design says and what's actually happening. I'm also checking whether there's proper fallback handling when CSP policies block CSS injection...

Checking fallback handling...

I found the issue: when the content script detects that CSP is blocking the injection and returns a fallback flag, the side panel code just logs a warning but never actually executes the `chrome.scripting.insertCSS` call that should happen as the final tier. The design specifies a three-tier fallback system, but the implementation stops at the warning without completing the fallback chain. I need to verify whether the `scripting` permission is even declared in the manifest.</details></think>

Looking at the code:
```javascript
if (card && card.dataset.toolName === 'apply_styles') {
  applyStylesCount++;
}
```

This counts ALL apply_styles calls, including rollback_last and rollback_all. But the design says it should only show for `save` mode. 

Actually, thinking through the flow more carefully - when the LLM calls apply_styles as a tool, the counter increments regardless of the mode parameter. The design specifically requires "若执行了 apply_styles(save)", but if a user requests a rollback and the agent calls apply_styles with rollback_all, the confirmation overlay would still appear, which doesn't align with the intended behavior.

Let me compile all the findings I've discovered so far...

Looking at the CSP fallback implementation, there's a gap between design and reality. The design calls for a three-tier CSP degradation strategy where the third option uses chrome.scripting.insertCSS, but the actual implementation only logs a warning when the scripting API is detected - it never actually invokes the insertCSS method. Plus, the manifest is missing the scripting permission entirely, which is a medium-to-high severity issue since styles won't inject on strict CSP pages.

For the undo button behavior, there's another mismatch - the design expects it to trigger a direct rollback, but the implementation routes it through the agent instead. That's a medium severity problem since it works but isn't efficient or dependable.

The float layer visibility condition has a minor issue where it checks for apply_styles calls broadly, including rollback operations, when it should only trigger after actual style applications.

There's also a mismatch in how rollback_last stores data — it's using the raw concatenated CSS stack instead of the deduplicated merged format, which creates inconsistency in storage even though the functionality remains correct. And I notice the manifest.json is missing the scripting permission that's needed for the proposed solution.</details></think>

现在我已经完整检查了设计方案和实现代码。以下是详细的对比分析结果。

---

## 设计与实现对比报告：样式应用与保存

### 一致的部分（设计已正确实现）

以下核心逻辑实现与设计完全一致：

1. **`apply_styles` 工具定义** — 三种 mode（`save`/`rollback_last`/`rollback_all`）的参数结构和语义完全匹配
2. **CSS 合并引擎** — `mergeCSS` 使用 `Map<selector, Map<prop, val>>` 按选择器+属性去重，at-rule 整体替换，与设计一致
3. **双层存储架构** — `sessions:{domain}:{id}:styles`（会话级）和 `persistent:{domain}`（域名级永久）正确实现
4. **永久样式重建** — `rebuildPersistentStyles()` 遍历同域名所有会话 CSS 用 `mergeCSS` 聚合，与设计一致
5. **`early-inject.js`** — 在 `document_start` 阶段读取 `persistent:{domain}` 注入 `<style id="styleswift-persistent">`，防闪烁，与设计一致
6. **Content Script cssStack** — 内存变更栈支持逐条回滚，`injectCSS` 推栈、`rollbackCSS` 弹栈/清空，与设计一致
7. **CSP 检测三方案** — `detectCSSInjectionMethod()` 正确实现了三级检测（`style-element` → `adopted-stylesheets` → `scripting-api`）
8. **样式摘要** — `updateStylesSummary()` 在每次 save/rollback 后更新
9. **会话切换** — `unloadSessionCSS` / `loadSessionCSS` 正确处理会话间样式隔离
10. **确认浮层基本结构** — `ConfirmationOverlay` 类实现了 60s 超时、确认/撤销按钮

---

### 存在冲突/缺陷的部分

#### 冲突 1：CSP 方案 3（`chrome.scripting.insertCSS`）未实现 — 严重

**设计要求**（设计方案第 358-383 行）：

> 方案 3：`chrome.scripting.insertCSS`，浏览器级别注入，完全绕过 CSP；需从 Side Panel/Service Worker 调用；需额外 `scripting` 权限。
> `injectCSSAuto` 方案 3 返回 `{ fallback: 'scripting-api', css }` 由 Side Panel 处理。

**实际实现**：

Content Script 端正确检测并返回了 fallback 对象：

```944:953:extension/content/content.js
function injectCSS(css) {
  cssStack.push(css);
  const method = detectCSSInjectionMethod();
  if (method === 'scripting-api') {
    return { fallback: 'scripting-api', css: cssStack.join('\n') };
  }
  applyCurrentCSS();
}
```

但 Side Panel 端只打了一条 warn 日志，**没有实际调用 `chrome.scripting.insertCSS`**：

```526:528:extension/sidepanel/tools.js
      const injectResp = await sendToContentScript({ tool: 'inject_css', args: { css } });
      if (injectResp && injectResp.fallback === 'scripting-api') {
        console.warn('[runApplyStyles] 页面 CSP 限制，无法通过 Content Script 注入 CSS');
```

同时 `manifest.json` 的 permissions 中**缺少 `scripting` 权限**：

```7:11:extension/manifest.json
  "permissions": [
    "activeTab",
    "storage",
    "sidePanel"
  ],
```

**影响**：在启用严格 CSP 的页面（如 GitHub、一些 SaaS 平台），样式注入会静默失败，用户看不到任何效果。

---

#### 冲突 2：确认浮层撤销走 Agent 路径而非直接调用 — 中等

**设计要求**（设计方案第 809-811 行）：

> 确认/撤销按钮直接触发回滚操作

**实际实现**：

```1450:1461:extension/sidepanel/panel.js
        onUndo: async () => {
          console.log('[Panel] 撤销最后一步样式');
          DOM.messageInput.value = '撤销最后一次样式修改';
          handleSendClick();
        },
        onUndoAll: async () => {
          console.log('[Panel] 撤销所有样式');
          DOM.messageInput.value = '撤销所有样式修改';
          handleSendClick();
        }
```

撤销按钮将自然语言消息填入输入框，通过完整的 Agent Loop → LLM → 工具调用 链路执行。

**问题**：
- 额外消耗一次 LLM API 调用（增加成本和延迟）
- LLM 不一定总是调用 `apply_styles(mode='rollback_last')`，行为不确定
- 用户体验上，点击"撤销"按钮后要等待 Agent 回复，不够即时

---

#### 冲突 3：确认浮层触发条件过宽 — 低中

**设计要求**：

> "若执行了 `apply_styles(save)`"才显示确认浮层

**实际实现**：

```1425:1427:extension/sidepanel/panel.js
        if (card && card.dataset.toolName === 'apply_styles') {
          applyStylesCount++;
        }
```

这里只检查工具名是 `apply_styles`，**不区分 mode**。这意味着当用户请求 rollback 后（Agent 调用 `apply_styles(mode='rollback_all')`），也会触发确认浮层，显示"确认效果/撤销"按钮 — 在回滚场景下这是不合理的。

---

#### 冲突 4：`rollback_last` 后存储格式不一致 — 低

**设计要求**：存储中始终保持 `mergeCSS` 去重合并后的规范化 CSS

**实际实现**：

```499:506:extension/sidepanel/tools.js
      const remainingCSS = await sendToContentScript({ tool: 'get_active_css' });
      const sKey = currentSession.stylesKey;
      if (remainingCSS && remainingCSS.trim()) {
        await chrome.storage.local.set({ [sKey]: remainingCSS });
```

`getActiveCSS()` 返回 `cssStack.join('\n')`（原始拼接），直接存入 storage。而 `save` 模式使用 `mergeCSS` 后存储。这导致：

- `save` 后 storage = 规范化合并的 CSS
- `rollback_last` 后 storage = 原始拼接的 CSS（多个 CSS 块用 `\n` 连接）

虽然功能上渲染结果相同，但存储格式不一致，可能在后续 `rebuildPersistentStyles` 时产生冗余规则。

---

### 总结

| 项目 | 状态 | 严重程度 |
|------|------|----------|
| 核心三模式流程（save/rollback_last/rollback_all） | 一致 | — |
| CSS 合并引擎（mergeCSS） | 一致 | — |
| 双层存储架构 | 一致 | — |
| 永久样式自动注入（early-inject.js） | 一致 | — |
| CSP 三级降级方案 | **方案 3 未实现** | **高** |
| manifest.json 缺少 scripting 权限 | **缺失** | **高** |
| 确认浮层撤销机制 | **走 Agent 路径，非直接调用** | **中** |
| 确认浮层触发条件 | **不区分 mode，rollback 也触发** | **低中** |
| rollback_last 存储格式 | **原始拼接而非 mergeCSS** | **低** |

核心的样式应用-合并-存储-持久化流程与设计方案高度一致，主要冲突集中在 CSP 降级的最后一道防线未实现、以及确认浮层的交互细节。需要优先处理的是 CSP 方案 3 的完整实现。

---

_**User**_

很好，除了以上需求修复的问题外，我打算去掉永久样式，只做会话样式，用户在某个会话下应用了样式，此页面就是该样式效果，若用户切换会话则页面应该换到对应会话的样式。

---

_**Agent (model claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking, mode Agent)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user wants to:

1. Remove persistent/permanent styles entirely (no more `persistent:{domain}` storage)
2. Keep only session-level styles - when a user applies styles in a session, the page shows those styles
3. When switching sessions, the page should switch to the corresponding session's styles

This is a significant architectural simplification. Let me think about what needs to change:

1. **Remove `early-inject.js`** - no more persistent styles at document_start
2. **Remove `persistent:{domain}` storage key** - no more domain-level persistent CSS
3. **Remove `rebuildPersistentStyles()`** in tools.js


4. **Update `runApplyStyles()`** - save mode no longer writes to persistent key, no more rebuild
5. **Update `rollback_all`** - no longer needs to rebuild persistent styles
6. **Update `rollback_last`** - no longer needs to rebuild persistent styles
7. **Update manifest.json** - remove early-inject.js from content_scripts
8. **Update session deletion** - no more `clearPersistent` logic
9. **Keep session switching** - `unloadSessionCSS` / `loadSessionCSS` already handles this correctly
10. **Update design document** - reflect the changes

Now I need to identify what else the user mentioned fixing. Let me look at what comes after this list to see what other issues need addressing. I need to map out which files require changes for this refactor. The manifest needs updating to remove the early injection script, that file can be deleted entirely, and the tools module needs significant simplification around style persistence. The panel needs fixes for the confirmation overlay behavior and session cleanup, while the content script stays mostly intact since the CSS stack mechanism remains. Let me check what else the agent loop might need.

Actually, I'm reconsidering the CSP fallback approach—the user wants persistent styles removed, but session styles still need to work, so the CSP issue is still relevant. Implementing the scripting API properly is complex though. 所有修改完成。让我总结一下所有变更。

---

## 变更总结

### 架构变更：移除永久样式，仅保留会话样式

**修改了 6 个文件，删除了 1 个文件。** 核心变化如下：

### 1. 删除 `extension/content/early-inject.js`
- 不再在 `document_start` 阶段自动注入永久样式
- 页面加载时不会有任何样式被自动应用

### 2. `extension/manifest.json`
- 移除了 `early-inject.js` 的 content_scripts 注册
- 新增了 `scripting` 权限（用于 CSP 方案 3 降级）

### 3. `extension/sidepanel/tools.js`（核心）
- **删除** `rebuildPersistentStyles()` 函数 — 不再维护域名级聚合样式
- **新增** `injectCSSViaScriptingAPI()` — 实现 CSP 方案 3 的实际降级调用
- **简化** `runApplyStyles()` 三种模式：
  - `save`：注入 + mergeCSS + 写入会话 stylesKey（移除了永久样式重建）；CSP 降级时实际调用 `chrome.scripting.insertCSS`
  - `rollback_last`：回滚 + 用 `mergeCSS('', remainingCSS)` 规范化存储（修复了之前的原始拼接问题）
  - `rollback_all`：回滚 + 删除会话 stylesKey（移除了永久样式重建）
- 更新工具描述，"永久保存"改为"保存到当前会话"

### 4. `extension/sidepanel/panel.js`
- **确认浮层**：只在 `apply_styles` 的 `save` 模式时计数触发（之前所有模式都触发）
- **撤销按钮**：直接调用 `executeTool('apply_styles', { mode: 'rollback_last/all' })`，不再通过 Agent 路径（省掉了一次 LLM 调用）
- **删除会话弹窗**：最后一个会话的删除弹窗不再询问"是否清除永久样式"，简化为确认删除
- **`executeDeleteSession`**：移除 `clearPersistent` 参数

### 5. `extension/sidepanel/session.js`
- 移除 `SessionContext` 的 `persistKey` getter

### 6. `extension/content/content.js`
- 清理了永久样式相关注释

### 新的样式生命周期

```
用户在会话 A 中应用样式 → 保存到 sessions:{domain}:A:styles
用户切换到会话 B → unloadSessionCSS() 卸载 A 的样式
                  → loadSessionCSS(B 的 CSS) 注入 B 的样式
用户切回会话 A   → 同理，自动切换
```

页面加载时不再有任何样式被自动注入，样式仅在 Side Panel 活跃且有会话时生效。

---

_**User**_

不行不行，会话样式仍然需要页面加载时自动注入，仍然需要document_start，只是说用户可以通过切换会话而变更页面样式风格，且不同会话的样式不会再重叠了。

---

_**Agent (model claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking, mode Agent)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user is clarifying their intent. They want:

1. **Keep** auto-injection at `document_start` - styles should still be automatically applied when the page loads
2. **Remove** the persistent/domain-level aggregation - no more merging styles across sessions
3. **Session switching** changes the page style - only ONE session's styles are active at a time
4. The active session's styles are what gets injected at `document_start`

So the key difference from the old design is:
- Old: `persistent:{domain}` = merge of ALL sessions' CSS → injected at document_start
- New: Store which session is "active" for a domain, and inject THAT session's CSS at document_start


- `early-inject.js` stays but now reads from the active session instead of the persistent merged styles
- I need to track which session is active per domain using a key like `active_session:{domain}`, then have the injection script look up that session ID and pull its styles at page load time
- When switching sessions, I update both the active session pointer and what the injection script will read

For the storage approach, I'm considering whether to keep a separate `active_styles:{domain}` key that mirrors the current session's CSS, so `early-inject.js` only needs one read instead of two. This would mean updating that key whenever styles change, a session switches, or a rollback happens. But the user mentioned removing permanent styles entirely, so I should reconsider what the actual requirement is here. 只做会话样式" - they want to remove the concept of persistent/permanent styles that aggregate across sessions. But they still want the ACTIVE session's styles to auto-inject on page load.

So the design should be:
1. `early-inject.js` reads the active session's styles and injects them
2. Only ONE session is active per domain at any time
3. Switching sessions changes which session's styles are active

Storage approach:
- `active_session:{domain}` → sessionId (which session is currently active)
- `sessions:{domain}:{sessionId}:styles` → CSS (unchanged)

At `document_start`, `early-inject.js` would:
1. Get domain
2. Read `active_session:{domain}` → sessionId
3. Read `sessions:{domain}:{sessionId}:styles` → CSS
4. Inject CSS

But this requires two async reads at `document_start`, which could introduce lag. Instead, I'll maintain a mirror key `active_styles:{domain}` that stores the CSS directly, so `early-inject.js` only needs one read. Whenever styles are applied, rolled back, or a session switches, I'll keep this mirror in sync with the active session's CSS. This is essentially just renaming the old `persistent:{domain}` key to reflect that it's now a copy of the active session rather than an aggregate. and changing the semantics from "merged all sessions" to "current session only". Let me simplify by keeping `active_styles:{domain}` as the key name since it's clear and descriptive.

Now I need to figure out what to restore and modify: I'll need to recreate `early-inject.js` to read from `active_styles:{domain}` instead, add it back to the manifest at `document_start`, update `tools.js` to write to this key when applying or rolling back styles, modify the session switching logic in `panel.js` to update the key when changing sessions, and replace the `persistKey` getter in `session.js` with an `activeStylesKey` getter.

The core flow is: when a user visits a page, `early-inject.js` runs first and injects any stored styles from `active_styles:{domain}`, then when the panel opens it loads the current session's styles and keeps that key in sync. session → `content.js` injects session CSS via `load_session_css`
3. User applies styles via agent → `runApplyStyles(save)`:
   - Inject via Content Script
   - Merge into `sessions:{domain}:{sessionId}:styles` (session storage)
   - Write merged result to `active_styles:{domain}` (for next page load)
4. User switches session:
   - `unloadSessionCSS` clears current styles
   - `loadSessionCSS` injects new session's styles  
   - Update `active_styles:{domain}` with new session's CSS (for next page load)
5. User refreshes page → `early-inject.js` picks up `active_styles:{domain}` → no flicker

This is clean. Let me implement it.

Key changes from what I already have:
1. Recreate `early-inject.js` to read `active_styles:{domain}` and restore `early-inject.js` in the manifest. I'll add an `activeStylesKey` getter to `SessionContext` since it's domain-level, then sync `active_styles:{domain}` in both `runApplyStyles` and `handleSessionClick`. I should also handle edge cases like clearing `active_styles:{domain}` when all sessions are deleted, and making sure it's properly initialized when creating new sessions.

When switching sessions or creating new ones, the system already handles clearing styles correctly—switching to an empty session reads its empty styles and writes that to `active_styles:{domain}`, so the next page load has no styles. Now I need to review what I've already implemented and finish the remaining pieces.</details></think>

所有修改完成。下面是完整的变更总结。

---

## 变更总结

### 核心设计变更

**旧模型**：`persistent:{domain}` = 所有会话的 CSS 聚合 → 页面加载时注入全部

**新模型**：`active_styles:{domain}` = 当前活跃会话的 CSS 镜像 → 页面加载时只注入当前会话的样式

切换会话 = 切换页面样式，不同会话的样式**不再重叠**。

### 修改文件清单（7 个文件）

**1. `extension/content/early-inject.js`** — 重建
- 从 `active_styles:{domain}` 读取当前活跃会话的样式
- 注入 `<style id="styleswift-active-persistent">`

**2. `extension/manifest.json`**
- 保留 `early-inject.js` 的 `document_start` 注册
- 新增 `scripting` 权限（CSP 方案 3）

**3. `extension/sidepanel/session.js`**
- 移除 `persistKey` getter（不再有域名级聚合样式）
- 新增 `activeStylesKey` getter → `active_styles:{domain}`

**4. `extension/sidepanel/tools.js`**
- 删除 `rebuildPersistentStyles()`（不再跨会话聚合）
- 新增 `syncActiveStyles()`：将当前会话的 stylesKey 内容同步到 `active_styles:{domain}`
- 新增 `injectCSSViaScriptingAPI()`：实现 CSP 方案 3 降级
- `runApplyStyles` 三种模式每次操作后都调用 `syncActiveStyles()`
- `rollback_last` 存储用 `mergeCSS('', remainingCSS)` 规范化

**5. `extension/sidepanel/panel.js`**
- 会话切换（`handleSessionClick`）：同步 `active_styles` 到目标会话的 CSS
- 新建会话（`handleNewSession`）：卸载样式 + 清空 `active_styles`
- 初始加载（`loadSessionForDomain`）：将会话样式注入 content.js，接管 early-inject 的样式
- 确认浮层：只在 `save` 模式触发，撤销直接调用 `executeTool` 而非走 Agent
- 删除会话弹窗：移除"清除永久样式"选项

**6. `extension/content/content.js`**
- 新增 `removeEarlyInjectStyle()`：移除 `#styleswift-active-persistent` 元素
- `loadSessionCSS` / `unloadSessionCSS` 调用时自动移除 early-inject 样式元素（content.js 接管后不再需要）

### 完整数据流

```
页面加载:
  early-inject.js (document_start)
    → 读取 active_styles:{domain}
    → 注入 <style#styleswift-active-persistent>  ← 防闪烁

Side Panel 打开:
  loadSessionForDomain
    → 读取 sessions:{domain}:{id}:styles
    → load_session_css → content.js 接管 (移除 early-inject 元素)
    → 同步 active_styles:{domain}

样式应用:
  runApplyStyles(save)
    → Content Script 注入
    → mergeCSS → sessions:{domain}:{id}:styles
    → syncActiveStyles → active_styles:{domain}

会话切换:
  handleSessionClick
    → unloadSessionCSS (清除旧样式 + early-inject 元素)
    → loadSessionCSS (注入新会话样式)
    → active_styles:{domain} ← 新会话的 CSS

新建会话:
  handleNewSession
    → unloadSessionCSS
    → 清空 active_styles:{domain}
```
